summary: Iteration 231 — Safety Branch v2 with 3-Level Risk Library Testing Complete. Backend: 29/29 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified including 3-level chain (Fase → Rischi → DPI/Misure), auto-calculation, Gate POS with blockers.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: session token test_perizia_205a45704b22, user_id user_perizia_de75ff42. Created test cantieri during testing which were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Safety Branch v2 with 3-level library fully working. Key changes from v1: (1) Old single libreria_rischi collection replaced with 3 collections: lib_fasi_lavoro (11 items), lib_rischi_sicurezza (20 items), lib_dpi_misure (31 items = 12 DPI + 11 misure + 8 apprestamenti). (2) Chain resolution: Fase.rischi_ids → Rischio.dpi_ids/misure_ids/apprestamenti_ids. (3) Gate POS now includes 'blockers' field for gate_critical domande. (4) Backward compatibility maintained via /api/libreria-rischi endpoints.

libreria_rischi.GET /api/libreria/rischi: PASSED - Returns 20 rischi with gate_critical, dpi_ids, misure_ids, apprestamenti_ids
libreria_rischi.domande_verifica: PASSED - Rischi have domande_verifica with gate_critical flag

libreria_dpi_misure.GET /api/libreria/dpi-misure: PASSED - Returns 31 entries (12 dpi + 11 misure + 8 apprestamenti)

libreria_resolve.POST /api/libreria/resolve-rischi: PASSED - Resolves rischi codici to full objects
libreria_resolve.POST /api/libreria/resolve-dpi: PASSED - Resolves dpi codici to full objects

cantieri_sicurezza_crud.POST /api/cantieri-sicurezza: PASSED - Creates cantiere with v2 schema
cantieri_sicurezza_crud.PUT /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}: PASSED - Updates with v2 fields including domande_residue

gate_pos.GET /api/cantieri-sicurezza/{id}/gate: PASSED - Returns gate_pos with blockers field
gate_pos.blockers_for_gate_critical: PASSED - Shows blockers when gate_critical domande are open
gate_pos.pronto_per_generazione: PASSED - False when blockers exist, True when all clear

backward_compatibility.GET /api/libreria-rischi: PASSED - Returns all library entries (fasi + rischi + dpi)

chain_resolution.fase_to_rischi: PASSED - fase.rischi_ids resolved to full rischi objects
chain_resolution.rischio_to_dpi: PASSED - rischio.dpi_ids resolved to full DPI objects
chain_resolution.full_chain: PASSED - Fase → Rischi → DPI complete chain works

frontend_sicurezza_page.list_display: PASSED - Shows table with Cantiere, Committente, Lavoratori, Fasi, Gate, Stato columns
frontend_sicurezza_page.new_button: PASSED - 'Nuova Scheda Cantiere' creates and navigates to detail page

frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step_navigation: PASSED - 4 step tabs (Cantiere, Fasi & Rischi, Macchine & DPI, Riepilogo)
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step1_cantiere: PASSED - Form fields for dati_cantiere, soggetti_riferimento, lavoratori
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step2_fasi_rischi: PASSED - Shows 11 fasi with expandable rischi chain (click chevron)
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step2_auto_calculation: PASSED - Selecting fase auto-calculates dpi_calcolati, misure_calcolate, apprestamenti_calcolati, domande_residue
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step3_calculated_sections: PASSED - Shows DPI Calcolati (5), Misure Organizzative (3), Apprestamenti (1) sections
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step4_gate_pos: PASSED - Shows Gate POS with progress bar, blockers section
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.step4_catena: PASSED - Shows Catena Fase → Rischi with confidence badges
frontend_scheda_cantiere_page.save_button: PASSED - Persists data to backend via PUT

v2_schema_changes.gate_pos_v2: Now includes 'blockers' field for gate_critical domande that are open
